description_long: This is a multi-tiered, classical-style stone fountain with three progressively smaller circular basins stacked vertically. Each tier is supported by a robust, cylindrical pedestal, and the topmost tier is crowned with a decorative finial. The basins have wide, gently sloping rims and are separated by thick, column-like supports. The surface appears to be made of light gray stone, possibly marble or concrete, with subtle texturing that mimics natural stone grain. The overall design is symmetrical and elegant, evoking traditional European garden fountains. There are no visible water features or jets present in the current state.
description: A tall, three-tiered classical stone fountain with wide circular basins and a decorative finial on top. The structure is robust and symmetrical, with a light gray stone finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height and all three circular basins, with the decorative finial clearly visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, highlighting the symmetry and the thickness of the supporting columns between tiers.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with the basins and finial visible, showing the consistent design around the fountain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, emphasizing the uniformity and circular shape of the basins.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a decorative finial at the top and subtle stone texturing throughout, but lacks intricate carvings, engravings, or elaborate motifs. The design is classical and minimalist, focusing on symmetry and proportion.
attribute_basin_structure: The fountain has three circular, tiered basins of decreasing size from bottom to top, each with a wide, gently sloped rim and supported by thick cylindrical columns. There are no visible compartments or divisions within the basins.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present in the current state of the fountain.
